non_blocking_findings.evidence: currentSessionWithoutSchedulerLoop mutates scheduler-loop event and artifact arrays after calling currentSessionWorkflowState(). This remains safe because currentSessionWorkflowState() returns a fresh JSON-parsed object per call.
non_blocking_findings.suggestion: Document the fresh-object dependency in the helper and add a defensive clone before mutation.

non_blocking_findings.evidence: The plan named adjacent scheduler-loop coverage qualitatively but did not enumerate exact files.
non_blocking_findings.suggestion: Enumerate focused gate paths, including root, projected shard, projection scheduler-loop, headless evidence, headless CLI loop continuation, context work-package runner, and workbench server scheduler-loop shards.

non_blocking_findings.evidence: projectedNextActionUnreachableClient is used only by fallback/projected tests.
non_blocking_findings.suggestion: Keep projectedNextActionUnreachableClient inline in the projected shard or explicitly document that it is projected-shard-only.

non_blocking_findings.evidence: The plan said CLI tests would move only if the root stayed above 500, leaving an unnecessary runtime decision.
non_blocking_findings.suggestion: Commit the plan to keep CLI/service-cycle smoke tests in the root because the projected split should leave the root below 500 lines.

decision: PASS. No blocker. Non-blocking suggestions were folded into the P27 plan before implementation.
